property.name: java.library.path
property.value:

odejs\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\Git\mingw64 in;C:\Program Files\Git\usr in;C:\Program Files\GitHub CLI\;c:	ools\php;C:\Program Files (x86)\sbt in;C:\Program Files\Amazon\AWSCLIV2\;C:\Program Files\Amazon\SessionManagerPlugin in\;C:\Program Files\Amazon\AWSSAMCLI in\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\130\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\mongosh\;C:\Program Files\LLVM in;C:\Program Files (x86)\LLVM in;C:\Usersunneradmin\.dotnet	ools;C:\Usersunneradmin\.cargo in;C:\Usersunneradmin\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;.

testcase.name: [5:47] access-check returns granted access with deterministic local auth and seeded merchant data
[8:112] login returns a deterministic local JWT when the local auth harness is enabled
[6:60] metricool returns a deterministic loginUrl when the local auth harness and API Global mock are enabled
[7:76] metricool surfaces a deterministic local unauthorized response in a controlled way
[8:89] metricool surfaces a deterministic local unavailable response in a controlled way
[9:102] metricool exposes a deterministic local incomplete payload without inventing a loginUrl
[10:116] metricool surfaces a deterministic local business error wrapped in a 200 response
[5:74] session returns a logged-in session shape with deterministic local auth
[2:27] config endpoint responds with deterministic local tenant configuration
[2:15] organizations domains endpoint returns deterministic tenant map for the seeded organization
[6:58] gbp posts returns a deterministic local happy path
[7:78] gbp posts supports a deterministic local create update delete lifecycle
[4:36] yext diffusion returns a deterministic local happy path
[12:138] yext connect returns a deterministic local happy path
[17:220] yext disconnect returns a deterministic local happy path
